login.sentLine2: Check your inbox (and spam folder). Click the "Sign in to rewrite.so" button. The link is valid for 15 minutes.

try.intro: Write something in the box below, then double-tap Shift to see 3 style rewrites.

unsubscribe.footnote: Note: this only stops onboarding emails. Transactional emails — login links, billing receipts, security alerts — keep working as required by law.
unsubscribe.invalidLink: This link is missing required parameters. Please use the unsubscribe link from the email directly, or email <email>hello@rewrite.so</email>.
unsubscribe.done: ✓ You're unsubscribed from onboarding emails. We're sorry to see you stop hearing from us.

pricing.intro: One free tier for occasional use. One Pro tier for daily writers. No surprise fees.

free.title: Free
free.feat2: {count} rewrites / month for anonymous web visitors
free.feat3: {count} rewrites / month for unsigned extension users
free.feat5: Auto-detect page language; pick a fixed target language in settings

pro.title: Pro
pro.subPrice: or ${yearlyMonthly} / month billed annually (${yearlyTotal} / year, save {savings}%)
pro.feat2: BYOK: bring your own OpenAI-compatible key for unlimited usage

faq.a1: Each time you trigger rewrite.so (double-tap Shift in any input), one request is sent to the model and three style variants stream back. That counts as one rewrite against your quota.
faq.q2: Do you store the text I rewrite?
faq.a2: No. Inputs and outputs pass through but are never persisted — not in application logs, not in error reporters, not in analytics. See our <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy> for details.
faq.a3: Pro users can configure a custom OpenAI-compatible base URL, model, and API key. When enabled, your text goes directly to your chosen provider (you pay them, not us), and the rewrites do not count against your monthly quota — only short-term abuse limits remain.
faq.q4: What happens if I exceed my quota?
faq.a4: The next request returns a 429 with a clear "quota exceeded" message. Quotas reset at 00:00 UTC on the first day of each month. You can upgrade or set up BYOK at any time.
faq.a5: Yes, anytime, from <settings>your settings</settings> via the "Manage subscription" portal. You keep Pro access until the end of the current billing period. Refund within 14 days of first charge — see <refund>Refund Policy</refund>.
faq.a6: <creem>Creem</creem> is our Merchant of Record. They process payments, taxes, and refunds on our behalf. Your card details never touch our servers.

contact.intro: We're a small team. Email is the fastest way to reach us; we typically reply within 1–2 business days.

card3.heading: Privacy & data requests

card4.heading: Security disclosure

card5.heading: Source & issues

footer.tagline: Double-tap Shift, instant AI rewrite in any input box.
footer.disclaimer: rewrite.so is an independent product. Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, or any other AI model provider. Underlying language models are accessed via standard OpenAI-compatible APIs.
footer.paymentsBy: Payments processed by <creem>Creem</creem>, our Merchant of Record.

hero.eyebrow: Works in any input. Open source.
hero.polyglot: Any language in. Any language out.
hero.intro: Double-tap <kbd>Shift</kbd> in any input box. AI gives you three ways to say it. Pick one with <kbd>1</kbd> / <kbd>2</kbd> / <kbd>3</kbd> and send.
hero.fineprint: {count} free rewrites/month · No card · Bring your own API key for unlimited

scenarios.intro: Getting the wording right takes more mental space than it should. Most of it goes to:
scenarios.pain1: You retyped that Slack message 3 times before sending it.
scenarios.pain2: You opened ChatGPT in another tab to "make it less harsh".
scenarios.pain3: You translated each sentence in your head before typing.
scenarios.pain4: You re-read the same email 4 times before hitting send.
scenarios.bridge: This is what rewrite.so was built for:
scenarios.useCase1: Writing in a language that isn't your first — learning, working, talking to overseas teammates.
scenarios.useCase2: Customer or client replies when the tone has to be just right.
scenarios.useCase3: Public posts — tweets, Reddit / HN comments, GitHub issues, PR descriptions.
scenarios.useCase4: Cold emails, apologies, hard conversations — places where one wrong word costs you.

privacy.h2: Your text is never stored. Period.
privacy.body: Not in databases. Not in logs. Not in error reporters. Not in analytics. The text you rewrite passes through the worker once and is gone. We don't use any third-party APM (Sentry, Datadog, etc.) precisely because they'd capture request bodies by default. This is not a promise — it's the architecture, and the source code is open for you to verify.

step1.title: Double-tap Shift
step1.body: Press <kbd>Shift</kbd> twice within 500ms. Password / CVV / OTP fields are skipped automatically.

step2.title: 3 styles, parallel
step2.body: Faithful, casual, formal — three tones at once. The first one shows up almost instantly.

step3.title: Press to accept
step3.body: Number key replaces the input. ↑↓+Enter also works. Esc to dismiss. Double-tap Shift again to regenerate.

features.h2: Built for people who care about how it works

openSource.label: OPEN SOURCE
openSource.title: Read the code yourself
openSource.body: Self-host, audit, fork. The privacy claims above aren't marketing — they're code you can read at <repo>github.com/rewrite-so/rewrite.so</repo>.

byok.label: BYOK
byok.title: Bring Your Own Key
byok.body: Plug in your OpenAI-compatible base URL + key + model. Rewrites go directly to your provider, AES-GCM-encrypted at rest, never logged. Doesn't count against the monthly quota.

pii.label: HARD PII EXCLUSION
pii.title: Won't fire in password fields
pii.body: Password / cc-* / current-password / new-password / one-time-code / fields with name or id matching password|pin|cvv|cvc|otp|secret|token — all hard-coded to be ignored. Not a setting. Not a feature flag.

stack.label: STACK
stack.title: Cloudflare Workers + D1 + Hono
stack.body: Edge-deployed worker, OpenAI Chat Completions wire format, 3-way concurrent fan-out with cascading client-abort. ~5000 lines of TypeScript. Strict mode. No ORM for business tables.

crossLang.label: CROSS-LANGUAGE
crossLang.title: Translation is implicit
crossLang.body: Set a fixed target language or auto-detect from the page. Writing English in a Chinese email or Japanese in Slack? Just rewrite — translation happens silently.

keyboard.label: KEYBOARD-ONLY
keyboard.title: Never breaks your flow
keyboard.body: UI is invisible by default. Only an 8px translucent dot appears when an input is focused. Need it: double-tap Shift. Don't need it: it isn't there.

finalCta.body: No signup. Open /try for the demo. Install the extension to use it on every site.

popup.tagline: Double-tap Shift Shift in any input.

targetLang.title: Target language
targetLang.hint: "Auto-detect from page" infers the target from the current site. e.g. typing Chinese on an English site → translates the rewrites to English.

trigger.title: Enable Shift Shift trigger
trigger.label: Enable keyboard shortcut in input fields
trigger.hint: When off, the dot is hidden and double-Shift won't trigger.

byok.title: BYOK · Bring your own API key
byok.placeholder: Pro feature, available in Phase 4. Will show base_url / model / key fields here.

step1.title: Try double-tapping Shift
step1.body: Type something below, then double-tap Shift. This is the only gesture you need.

step2.title: Set the target language
step2.body: Rewrites are output in the target language. "Auto-detect from page" works for most people — typing Chinese on an English site auto-translates the rewrite to English.

step3.title: Ready
step3.body: When you focus any web input, a tiny dot appears bottom-right. Double-tap Shift to rewrite. Try it on:

hint.tryOnAnyInput: Install the extension to use it on any site
